title: AscendantEvent
description: Envelope schema for all AscendantEvent types ingested by the Maker Chronicle pipeline. Every event type shares the base fields; domain-specific payload is carried in the 'payload' object and validated against the referenced sub-schema.

eventId.description: Unique AscendantEvent identifier. Format: asc-evt-NNNN (zero-padded to at least 4 digits).

eventType.description: The type of world-state change that triggered this event. Maps to a Divine Domain and Chronicle blurb template.

domain.description: The Divine Domain to which this event belongs. Used to route the event to the correct Chronicle blurb template and curator queue.

makerId.description: Unique maker (God Mode account) identifier. Format: mk-NNNN-slug. Present on all events; attribution display is governed by attributionMode.

attributionMode.description: How the maker's identity should appear in player-facing Chronicle output. 'public' = real epithet shown; 'pseudonymous' = epithet shown but makerId hidden; 'anonymous' = no maker information surfaced.

makerEpithet.description: Display name or pseudonym for this maker. Required when attributionMode is 'public' or 'pseudonymous'. Omit or null when 'anonymous'.

sigilAsset.description: Asset pipeline reference ID for the maker's sigil. Optional. Omitted if attributionMode is 'anonymous'.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was created in the God Mode system.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version used to validate this event. Defaults to current version if omitted. Used by the ingestion pipeline to apply the correct validation rules.

groundTruthRef.description: Reference ID for the corresponding GroundTruth API record. Used to fetch authoritative world-state data during Chronicle entry creation.

tags.description: Optional pre-assigned tags from the God Mode system. Chronicle curators may add or remove tags during curation.

payload.description: Domain- and eventType-specific data payload. Structure is governed by the eventType. See sub-schemas below ('$defs') for each event type's payload shape.

moderationHooks.description: Optional moderation metadata injected by the God Mode system at event creation. Can pre-flag events for expedited or restricted review.

autoFlag.description: If true, the ingestion pipeline immediately routes this event to the moderation queue rather than the curator draft queue.

flagReason.description: Reason for auto-flagging. Required when autoFlag is true.

restrictedAccess.description: If true, the resulting Chronicle entry is visible only to curators and moderators until explicitly published.

priorityLevel.description: Queue priority for curation assignment. 'urgent' bypasses normal round-robin and notifies senior curator.

ingestionMeta.description: Internal metadata added by the Chronicle ingestion pipeline. Not set by the God Mode system — populated by the pipeline on receipt.

receivedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was received by the Chronicle ingestion pipeline.

ingestedBy.description: Service or process identifier that ingested this event.

chronicleEntryId.description: The Chronicle entry ID assigned after successful ingestion. Null until ingestion completes.

ingestionStatus.description: Current ingestion pipeline status for this event.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors encountered during ingestion. Empty array if valid.

AreaPayload.title: AreaPayload
AreaPayload.description: Payload for AREA_CREATED, AREA_MODIFIED, AREA_DELETED events. Domain: Genesis.

areaId.description: Unique area identifier in the world-state.

areaName.description: Display name of the created or modified area.

accessTier.description: Recommended player tier for accessing this area.

coordinates.description: World-space coordinates of the area anchor point.

ecology.description: Brief description of the area's ecology, populated by the Genesis system.

boundaryLayerStatus.description: State of the Genesis boundary layer at event time.

linkedEntities.description: Entity IDs of bosses, NPCs, or spawns seeded in this area at creation time.

ForgePayload.title: ForgePayload
ForgePayload.description: Payload for POWER_FORGE, ITEM_CREATED, ITEM_MODIFIED, ITEM_DELETED events. Domain: Forge.

itemId.description: Unique item identifier in the world-state.

itemName.description: Display name of the forged item.

forgeLocation.description: Location where the forging took place.

materials.description: List of materials consumed in the forging process.

resonanceRating.description: Forge domain resonance rating assigned by the system.

isUnique.description: True if this item is a unique, non-replicable artifact.

replicationStatus.description: Whether other makers can attempt to replicate this item's forging process.

EntityPayload.title: EntityPayload
EntityPayload.description: Payload for BOSS_SPAWN, ENTITY_CREATED, ENTITY_MODIFIED, ENTITY_DELETED, NPC_CREATED, NPC_MODIFIED events. Domain: Genesis or Weave.

spawnLocation.description: World-state location identifier where the entity spawned.

respawnCycleSecs.description: Respawn cycle in seconds. Null if entity does not respawn.

associatedDrops.description: Item IDs that can drop from this entity.

loreClassification.description: How the entity is classified in the Chronicle lore system.

LorePayload.title: LorePayload
LorePayload.description: Payload for LORE_ENTRY, LORE_REVISED, LORE_REDACTED events. Domain: Chronicle.

sourceWeight.description: Epistemic weight (0.0–1.0) assigned by the Chronicle Accounting committee.

canonStatus.description: Current canonization flag for this lore record.

primarySources.description: List of primary source IDs cited in this lore entry.

disputedClaims.description: Free-text list of claims currently under dispute.

accessLevel.description: Who can read this lore entry in the Chronicle.

CalibrationPayload.title: CalibrationPayload
CalibrationPayload.description: Payload for CALIBRATION, SYSTEM_MODIFIED, SYSTEM_CREATED events. Domain: Clockwork.

systemId.description: Unique system identifier in the Clockwork domain.

cycleId.description: The Clockwork cycle number during which this calibration occurred.

toleranceBand.description: Acceptable tolerance band for the calibrated metric.

postCalibrationMetrics.description: Key-value map of metric name to post-calibration value.

openFlags.description: Calibration flags remaining open after this intervention.

failsafeStatus.description: State of the primary failsafe at end of calibration.

GenericPayload.title: GenericPayload
GenericPayload.description: Fallback payload for event types not covered by a domain-specific payload schema (e.g., QUEST_CREATED, FACTION_CREATED). Accepts any additional properties.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the event payload, for Chronicle ingestion fallback.

refIds.description: Any relevant world-state reference IDs associated with this event.

payload.ecology: Storm-touched fauna, perpetual electrical storms, basalt spire formations.

moderationHooks.flagReason: Tier-5 boss spawn requires senior curator review before publication.
